issues.description: Missing [Blocker] keyword effect entirely. This should be a keyword field, not an effect entry.
Wrong trigger type. The effect triggers [On Your Opponent's Attack], not Activated. Should use trigger OnAttacked or a specific opponent attack trigger.
Wrong condition type. Should check LeaderHasType for 'Baroque Works', not HasCardOnBoard with name 'Baroque Works'.
Missing cost specification. The effect requires 'DON!! −1' cost, which should be represented in a cost field.
Missing [Once Per Turn] restriction in the effect.
GiveDon action missing 'active: true' to indicate the DON!! is set as active, not rested.
